data.name: 病房軼事～只有惡質護士存在的醫院～
data.detailed_description:
遊戲特色：

  • 登場的女主角皆有全程配音！
  • M男向視覺小說，值得抖M的您細細品味！

故事大綱

這間醫院……不存在服務精神！

本作的主角是名為「山田」的青年，他身患怪病。
而這樣的他因為雙手骨折而住院，所以住院期間只能麻煩護士幫忙。
雖然登場的護士全都有各自的怪癖，但不管再怎麼樣，
山田和護士間都不可能產生感情。

山田到底能不能順利出院呢？敬請期待。

登場角色


立花　CV：未来羽
厭世護士。

認真又有責任感，是一名優秀的護士。
這樣的形容似乎跟惡質沾不上邊，但問題主要出在工作環境上。
因為被夾在不講理的上司與無法獨當一面的後輩之間，讓立花總是白白受罪……
結果，她成了一個表情兇狠眼神冷淡的存在。
熱情跟體貼都已經消磨殆盡，支撐她如行屍走肉般處理每天業務的只剩義務感，
對待患者與同事也變得刻薄。


黑川　CV：一色Hikaru
陰沉護士

自卑又自虐，犯錯時先找藉口的類型。
但又會在當事人不在的地方說盡對方壞話。
單方面的忌妒讓她個性陰沉且充滿怨恨，會做出惡質的報復行為，是個公認的人渣。
不敢忤逆強者，但卻會毫不留情地凌虐弱者。
只要看情況不對，就會馬上裝出自己才是受害者的態度大哭大鬧，
而且還打從心底認為自己沒有錯。
從山田身上嗅到同類的氣味，想和他成為人渣朋友。


山口　CV：神代岬
粗暴護士

前不良少女，粗暴程度勝過男人。
沒耐心又粗魯，出手比出嘴還快的類型。
或許是受到不良少女時期的上下關係影響，如果被看不起，態度就會爛到爆。
但另一方面，她也有著憧憬戀愛的少女心。
只是，對象絕對不會是山田。


平松　CV：海原Elena
無精打采護士

極度怠惰與沒幹勁，有機會就偷懶。
只要旁人沒看好她，她就立刻變成一灘爛泥。
對任何事都沒幹勁也不關心，照顧山田一事當然也是如此。
身上總是纏繞著慵懶的氣場，動作緩慢，服裝儀容也隨便。
唯獨喝酒時會打起精神。

data.short_description: 由Dark One! 打造的日本超人氣醫院冒險遊戲！因為雙手骨折而住院的山田，受到個性最差的護士們照顧。獨特的故事設定和人物吸引了人們的目光，讓本作成為跨足小說、漫畫等形式的強力娛樂作品！也推薦給想欣賞實力派配音員演出的玩家。紳士絕對不容錯過！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.0GHz+
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • 備註: 1280×720 display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • 備註: 1280×720 or higher display

data.name: Nope Nope Nurses
data.detailed_description:
FEATURES

  • A visual novel about a hospital where all the nurses are the worst
    Full Japanese voice acting by seasoned professionals

SUMMARY

Hospital ≠ hospitality...?!

Yamada is afflicted with a rare condition that makes his life hard, and when he manages to break bones in both his hands too, he ends up on a medical bed with beautiful nurses tending to his every need.
Make no mistake, though—these nurses are vicious and no love sparks fly... Will young Yamada leave the hospital with his sanity intact?

CHARACTER


"Begrudging Nurse" Tachibana
Voice: Mirau

Serious, responsible, and excellent at her job. However, after being stuck between difficult management and inexperienced juniors for so long, her expression is as austere as her gaze is icy—even to her patients and colleagues. Tachibana's compassion and love for nursing have all but faded, and she attends to Yamada in a brisk, soulless manner, driven only by her stubborn sense of duty.


"Insidious Nurse" Kurokawa
Voice: Hikaru Isshiki

Sneaky and self-deprecating, Kurokawa is quick to bow and scrape when caught out, but is equally adept at bad-mouthing others the second they're not in the room. A self-proclaimed "trash human" with a penchant for petty revenge on all rivals, real or imagined. Avoids confronting people she sees as more powerful, but revels in bullying the weak. This nurse also loves to play the victim card—and believes all her own nonsense, too. Suspects Yamada to be fellow trash and thus a potential ally.


"Violent Nurse" Yamaguchi
Voice: Misaki Kamishiro

Former teen delinquent with a mean violent streak and obvious anger management issues—Yamaguchi is keen to let her fists do the talking for her. Perhaps due to her rough past, she doesn't take well to perceived slights and has a problem with following orders. Underneath, she's a hopeless romantic, although this softer side is never directed at Yamada.


"Demotivational Nurse" Hiramatsu
Voice: Elena Kaibara

Chronically lazy and unmotivated. Slacks off every chance she gets unless constantly supervised. Hiramatsu is thoroughly apathetic and indifferent, not least when tending to Yamada's needs. She gives off a languid anti-work aura wherever she goes, and takes her sweet time getting anything done. Sports a consistently sloppy and unkempt appearance. About the only time this nurse perks up is when she's been drinking.

data.short_description: Hospital ≠ hospitality...?! You're stuck on a medical bed with nurses tending to your every need. The only problem? Their personalities... Experience life with demons in white dresses in this visual novel misadventure!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 1.0GHz+
  • Graphics: VRAM 128MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • Additional Notes: 1280×720 display
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 8.1 / 10
  • Processor: Multi-core 2.0GHz+
  • Graphics: VRAM 256MB+
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: PCM (DirectSound support)
  • Additional Notes: 1280×720 or higher display
